name: Drafto
subtitle: Notes, offline & synced
description:
Drafto is a fast, offline-first note-taking app that syncs seamlessly across all your devices.

Organize your thoughts in notebooks, write with a rich text editor, and never lose a word — even without an internet connection. Changes sync automatically when you're back online.

Key features:
- Rich text editor with formatting, headings, lists, and code blocks
- Organize notes into notebooks
- Offline-first: read, write, and edit without internet
- Automatic background sync across devices
- Dark mode (system or manual toggle)
- Trash with restore — nothing is lost by accident
- Attach images and files to your notes
- Deep linking to open notes directly
- Fast and lightweight

Drafto is also available as a web app at drafto.eu. Your notes stay in sync between mobile and web.
